description: IF with DISPLAY and MOVE — WS-X=10 triggers BIG branch, WS-X stays unchanged
notes: IF WS-X > 5 fires for X=10. DISPLAY is emitted as print() by the engine (side effect only). MOVE 'BIG' TO WS-MSG verifies the branch executed. WS-X remains 10 — not modified by either branch. Tests DISPLAY coexisting with MOVE inside IF.
